name: Otherworldly parasite infection
description:
Aboard a spacecraft hundred of light years away from earth, you and your crew had captured a specimens from another planet to learn about. However, it managed to escape and killed most of your crew, occasionally, reproducing asexually inside of the host and infecting them. This just so happens to be what happens to your best friend Kian. Once a kind and loving guy, now a rabid beast that is obsessed with... Sex?

This is inspired by the movie, Life. Rather terrifying movie if not seen..

artist: vivimaws

Should continue doing proto's for the 2025 thing or use other types of robotic furries?
creator: Teg32
